-## 🔥 NEW LEARNING Wk12 — Lead Promo Creates Free-Riders
-- Recent cancels ALL at tenure=30 or 60 days (exact billing cycles)
-- Tenure=30 = got $0 first bill from $30 lead promo, then cancelled at first real bill re-eval
-- Tenure=60 = paid 1 bill, cancelled at second re-eval
-- **$30 lead promo creates effective 30-day free trial with high cancel rate**
-- Since ads off, not major issue now. But RESET lead_promo if restarting ads.
-
-## 🔥 NEW LEARNING Wk12 — Billing Distribution Matters
-- Daily sub payments in ledger range 11-44 (not uniform 30/day)
-- Wk11: avg 30 bills/day = $3,073 | Wk12: avg 19 bills/day = $1,596
-- Uneven billing_day_mod30 means revenue LUMPY week-to-week
-- Don't panic on single-week drop — look at 2-wk trailing
-
-## 🔥 NEW LEARNING Wk12 — Competitor Drift MATH
-- Wk12 competitor events: +0.22 Q expectation drift (vs my +0.015 dev gain)
-- **GAP WIDENED +0.205 Q in one week**
-- Even at $1000/day dev ($7K/wk, +0.029 Q/wk), can't outpace drift
-- **Only R&D T5+ (+0.22-0.85 Q jumps) can close gap**, costs $833K+
-- Accept: can't win Q war without big R&D bet → harvest cash path
-
